params.account: The account that the roles were changed for.
params.newRoleBitmap: The new roles for the account.
params.oldRoleBitmap: The old roles for the account.
params.resource: The resource that the roles were changed within.

returns.counts: The number of assignees for each of the roles in the given role bitmap, expressed as a packed array of 4-bit ints.
returns.mask: The mask for the given role bitmap.

grantRoles(uint256,uint256,address).details: The caller must have all the necessary admin roles for the roles being granted.      Cannot be used with ROOT_RESOURCE directly, use grantRootRoles instead.

params.account: The account to grant roles to.
params.resource: The resource to grant roles within.

returns._0: `true` if the roles were granted, `false` otherwise.

grantRootRoles(uint256,address).details: The caller must have all the necessary admin roles for the roles being granted.

params.account: The account to grant roles to.

returns._0: `true` if the roles were granted, `false` otherwise.
`true` if any of the roles in the given role bitmap has assignees, `false` otherwise.
`true` if `account` has been granted all the given roles in the given resource or the `ROOT_RESOURCE`, `false` otherwise.
`true` if `account` has been granted all the given roles in the `ROOT_RESOURCE`, `false` otherwise.

revokeRoles(uint256,uint256,address).details: The caller must have all the necessary admin roles for the roles being revoked.      Cannot be used with ROOT_RESOURCE directly, use revokeRootRoles instead.

params.account: The account to revoke roles from.
params.resource: The resource to revoke roles within.

returns._0: `true` if the roles were revoked, `false` otherwise.

revokeRootRoles(uint256,address).details: The caller must have all the necessary admin roles for the roles being revoked.

params.account: The account to revoke roles from.

returns._0: `true` if the roles were revoked, `false` otherwise.

params.resource: The resource to get the role count for.

returns._0: count The role count bitmap for the resource.

params.account: The account to get the roles for.
params.resource: The resource to get the roles for.

returns._0: The roles bitmap for the account in the resource.

setTokenUri(uint256,string).details: Restricted to accounts holding the metadata update role on the root resource.

params.tokenId: The token identifier whose URI is being set.
params.uri: The new metadata URI for the token.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

params.tokenId: The token identifier to look up.

returns._0: The stored URI for `tokenId`, or an empty string if none has been set.

_ROLE_UPDATE_METADATA.details: Role bit allowing an account to update individual token URIs.

_ROLE_UPDATE_METADATA_ADMIN.details: Admin-tier counterpart of the metadata update role, shifted into the upper half of the bitmap.

_tokenUris.details: Per-token mapping from token ID to its metadata URI.

constructor.notice: Initializes SimpleRegistryMetadata, granting all roles to the caller.

getAssigneeCount(uint256,uint256).notice: Returns the number of assignees for the roles in the given role bitmap.

grantRoles(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Grants all roles in the given role bitmap to `account`.

grantRootRoles(uint256,address).notice: Grants all roles in the given role bitmap to `account` in the ROOT_RESOURCE.

hasAssignees(uint256,uint256).notice: Checks if any of the roles in the given role bitmap has assignees.

hasRoles(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Checks if the given account has been granted all the given roles in the given resource or the `ROOT_RESOURCE`.

hasRootRoles(uint256,address).notice: Checks if the given account has been granted all the given roles in the `ROOT_RESOURCE`.

revokeRoles(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Revokes all roles in the given role bitmap from `account`.

revokeRootRoles(uint256,address).notice: Revokes all roles in the given role bitmap from `account` in the ROOT_RESOURCE.

roleCount(uint256).notice: Returns the role count bitmap for a resource.

roles(uint256,address).notice: Returns the roles bitmap for an account in a resource.

setTokenUri(uint256,string).notice: Sets the metadata URI for a specific token.

tokenUri(uint256).notice: Returns the metadata URI for the given token.

userdoc.notice: `IRegistryMetadata` implementation that stores a distinct URI per token ID. URIs can be         set by accounts holding the metadata update role in the root resource.
